description: Letter from a son, unidentified location, to his father, in Cairo. In Judaeo-Arabic. The sender is anxious for news of Abū l-Majd, and how he fared after leaving Bilbays. The addressee should inquire about him from any caravan that arrives from Syria. This letter should be forwarded to Abū l-Majd if possible. (Information from Goitein's notes.) There are photostats and an edition in Goitein's notes (to be uploaded).
description_he: מכתב מבן לא ידוע לאביו בקהיר; ביהודית-ערבית; מוטרד לגורל אבו אל-מג'ד לאחר עזבו בלביס; מבקש לברר מנסיעי שיירות מסוריה
